title: polyscias zippeliana
intro: Polyscias zippeliana, also known as the Cinnabar or Zippel's polynesian, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae, commonly found in the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands. Traditionally, the plant has been used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Polyscias zippeliana are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of extracts or infusions, and can be applied topically to the skin or consumed as a tea to harness its medicinal properties.
